placements.overview:
Established in 2008, Mahendra Engineering College for Women is a private institute in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 7 courses across 5 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Mahendra Engineering College for Women programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Mahendra Engineering College for Women courses are provided in several streams including Engineering and Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 489 students. The fees at Mahendra Engineering College for Women ranges between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

Mahendra Engineering College for Women is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Mahendra Engineering College for Women programmes is around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahendra Engineering College for Women is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Mahendra Engineering College for Women programmes is around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses are available at Gokul Group of Institutions for students?

faqs.answer: Gokul Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.PharmaCandidates should have completed 16 years of age by the date of commencement of admission or on such other date as may be notified by the CET committee. There is no upper age limit.M.PharmaCandidate must have passsed B.Pharma. and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt

admission_process.title: Gokul Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Gokul Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Gokul Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma, M.Pharma and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,40,000 - 1,60,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

cutoff_tables: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence)
courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Engineering can enroll in theGokul Group of Institutions B.E. / B.Techprogramme, which lasts for 4 years. Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

faqs.question: How can I get into Gokul Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Gokul Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.PharmaCandidates should have c

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Gokul Group of Institutions for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: Gokul Group of Institutions courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as AICTE. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Gokul Group of Institutions goes up to 723.

highlights.summary: The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Subas Institute of Technology admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This institute is very good for study.

review_content.Placements: Students who passed the selection criteria of JEE Main and OJEE exam got selected for our course. Top companies like Tata Steel, Tata Power, etc., visit here for placements. The highest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1 LPA. Roles offered by the companies are senior engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: An electrical lab and a computer lab are available in our department for practicals. There is a small library for students. There is no Wi-Fi on our campus, and a small playground is available for multiple sports. The quality of food served is very bad in our hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is better to complete graduation than others because of its good placements and infra.

review_content.Placements: Top companies have been approached for placements, and over half of the students in our college have a minimum 65 percent academic score, and mostly software companies are student placements. On the core side, no one got placements in our college. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Wipro, and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: While we are studying, there is no Wi-Fi limit of 35 MB of data. Now I think the Wi-Fi facility is there. Labs, or average infrastructure, and libraries have so many good books available. Nice facilities now provide average food quality, the mess in the canteen is so bad, and medical facilities are available. Sports are a good place to practise.

reviews_list.review_title: The campus is beautiful and has a good environment.

It provides an air-conditioner and laboratories. It also has a good parking space. Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus. The hostel is clean with good furniture 24X7 water, a good dining room, and 24X7 electricity. It has a big playground and transportation facilities for far village students.

faqs.answer: Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 3 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

overview_faqs.question: Can Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering are B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering has a rating of 3.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.9, 3.6, 4 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Kandula Obul Reddy Memorial College Of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good staff to learn and achieve big things in your life.

content.Placements: In my college, 70 to 80% of the students are placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, and Tech Mahindra. 80% of students got internships, and the top roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good lab facilities are available, and Wi-Fi is also available. We have good networking speed and digital classrooms are also available with AC classrooms. Hostel facilities are extraordinary with AC rooms and attached bathrooms with good food and snacks in the evening. Extracurricular activities are conducted like sports and games indoor and outdoor like cricket, volleyball, kho-kho, and baseball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for students with minimum education and curricular activities.

content.Placements: My college has a total of 80 members in the CSE stream. Nearly 70 students got internships. Still, we didn't get any company for recruitment. We are waiting for the placement drive. The CSE department secured 40-50% of placements last year. Top roles in the last year were testing head and project management. Students secured 12 LPA. A few more are taken as freshers.
content.Infrastructure: My college contains two blocks for CSE and ECE. It has two grounds for volleyball and handball courts. There is also a shuttle court. We have two libraries and six labs for both CSE and ECE departments. Both boys' and girls' hostel facilities are available. The food is also nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is better to complete graduation than others because of its good placements and infra.

content.Placements: Top companies have been approached for placements, and over half of the students in our college have a minimum 65 percent academic score, and mostly software companies are student placements. On the core side, no one got placements in our college. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Wipro, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: While we are studying, there is no Wi-Fi limit of 35 MB of data. Now I think the Wi-Fi facility is there. Labs, or average infrastructure, and libraries have so many good books available. Nice facilities now provide average food quality, the mess in the canteen is so bad, and medical facilities are available. Sports are a good place to practise.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The campus is beautiful and has a good environment.

content.Placements: Around 95% of students are placed in top companies like Capgemini, HCL, etc. The average salary package offered is 6.5 LPA with free accommodation.
content.Infrastructure: It has well-experienced faculty members, and the best laboratories are provided. It also has workshops with a Wi-Fi facility. It provides an air-conditioner and laboratories. It also has a good parking space. Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus. The hostel is clean with good furniture 24X7 water, a good dining room, and 24X7 electricity. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: My name is Anu. In our college, from our department, out of 135 students, about 109 students were placed. The highest salary package offered in our department is 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies here are L&T, Megha Constructions, etc. About 78% of students got internships from here. Project engineer and head of department roles are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, for every department, well and good infrastructure is provided. Facilities for students are good. For every department, they provide Wi-Fi in every classroom. There is the best library with a lot of volumes and the latest version of books. The quality of food served is very hygienic and tasty. The hostel premises are very clean. A doctor is available for quick medical facilities. We have sports preference in our college.

Nice facilities now provide average food quality, the mess in the canteen is so bad, and medical facilities are available. Sports are a good place to practise.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is beautiful and has a good environment.
reviews.review_text: It has well-experienced faculty members, and the best laboratories are provided. It also has workshops with a Wi-Fi facility. It provides an air-conditioner and laboratories. It also has a good parking space. Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus. The hostel is clean with good furniture 24X7 water, a good dining room, and 24X7 electricity. It has a big playground and transportation facilities for far village students.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, for every department, well and good infrastructure is provided. Facilities for students are good. For every department, they provide Wi-Fi in every classroom. There is the best library with a lot of volumes and the latest version of books. The quality of food served is very hygienic and tasty. The hostel premises are very clean. A doctor is available for quick medical facilities. We have sports preference in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the studies and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The campus has a peaceful environment. I would recommend it. There is no canteen. But there are local shops nearby, so you can get everything. The classrooms are clean and neat. Maintenance is good. A good garden and playground are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good at enjoyment. They need to change teachers and dissatisfied with education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of our college are good. Labs and material are available. Wi-Fi is also available, but it will not work properly. Quality of food is not good, and it will have health issues for students who will be depended only on it. Particular medical facilities are not available here, and everyone goes to the nearest village for treatments. Sports are conducted for occasionally, but for games, coaching is not provided by any trainers.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for our course development is very good Wi-Fi and labs. The quality of the hostel facility is very good, and the food is available in the canteen is very good and clean. Medical facilities are good, and students play sports and game daily.

reviews.review_heading: It is below average and I am not much satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good at our college. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are good. It has a hygienic environment. Facilities in the hostel are also good and satisfactory to the students. Food is good, friendly, and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: There is an average college.
reviews.review_text: There is a good atmosphere. There is no Wi-Fi in the college. The labs are good and the classrooms are okay. The library is good. There is nothing much good in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty, infrastructure and placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of some better infrastructure in labs and classrooms. Wi-Fi facilities are poor, library is some what better infrastructure and nice collection of books hostel is some better and mess conditions are better canteen medical facilities are less.

reviews.review_heading: There were good placements in 2017.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library. Good quality facilities are provided in our college for engineering. The quality food is served in the hostel, and sports, games, medicines, etc., are also available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: College environment and infrastructure are quite good. The faculty is very friendly.

review_content.Placements: At our BVSR Engineering College, there are no placements. It is a tired 3 college so you have to go out of the college and search for jobs on your own. I am currently studying electronics and communication engineering in 4th year. There are no companies that come to our college for placements, or not even offer us jobs to do. But when we go out of college, we are able to get a job.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college environment is pretty good. At BVSR Engineering College, we have a medium-sized library and a small canteen for food. Classrooms are good but no AC is provided. Wi-Fi is not working in our college. Labs are okay, but not that much good. The equipment in our labs is old. The hostel is very bad in terms of living. Washrooms are not good, but the food is okay. There is no gym for students to work out and no sports for them because there is no PT sir.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure, facilities, etc. It provided good placements in year 2018.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 10,000 per month. Top companies visit our campus for recruitment and offer top roles. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 3 LPAack per annum. The lowest package salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Around 40% of students got internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available for students. There is a library on campus. We have separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of the food served is super. A playground is available for playing sports and games.

faqs.question: How can I get into BVSR Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
BVSR Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.

Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. review_summary.college_name: Surendera Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has a nice faculty and teaching.

content.Placements: There is no high-valued company placement, moderate or local companies are coming to allow working in their company. As a student of civil engineering, B.Tech, we got the opportunity to work in the architecture and construction site field for learning the skill.
content.Infrastructure: Course and building facilities are good. Hostel buildings are separated, and boys' and girls' hostels are separated. The library is full of a very calm environment and comfortable, There are many useful books for study in the library. The staff of the college is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a good place for students to develop their career.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of students were placed. Around 30-40 companies visit for campusing and hired students. In every department, almost 80-90% of students got good placements. They make students' jobs ready by encouraging and helping them. I got placed in 2 companies so the placements cell was good. Almost 90% of students were placed in our college. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and all students were well trained by the placements cell to understand basic aptitude tests, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good in this college. It provides Wi-Fi services and a library was available with several books. There was a mess, canteen, and a maggi hotspot for food facility, and all had good food with proper hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Overall atmosphere is motivational.

content.Placements: The placements of our college are good. Our placement cell is working hard to place students in great companies. For more details, you can check our college website as all the information is available there in detail. The companies comes for the placements are not so good. Packages are average for an MBA degree holder. 4-5 LPA is the average package they provide. The institute needs to develop their criteria for the placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is clean and gives good vibes. Along with that, mock court, library, video editing room, etc. , are available. For students, the canteen is also important, so the good thing is the canteen is also great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am not so satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: There is no placement in college for civil engineering at 2021-2022. There is no student placed in any placement due to pandemic. There is no companies recruitment for our college. In last years there is some placement from call center in which last year students are eligible.
content.Infrastructure: The building of college is very well structured and have all facilities in campus like labs, classroom, ventilation system, cooling system, canteen, mess etc. There is ground for sports like badminton ground, kabadi ground. Food facilities also available in hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure and facilities of the college.

content.Placements: There were about 80 to 85 students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 7.8 LPA and the lowest salary package was 3.5 LPA. Many companies recruited the students from our course. The top recruited companies are Google and TCS. Most of the students were not interested in internships. We got the opportunity to be a coordinator on engineer's day.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that were provided to us were absolutely good. Students were provided with high-speed data, the classrooms and labs were fully air-conditioned and the library was also good. The food quality in mess or canteen was also good and all the students were satisfied with it. Medical facilities were also available for all the students and sports tournaments like cricket, badminton, and volleyball were held every year.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 495 students were admitted at Shriram College of Agricultural Engineering and 544 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 544 students 356 were placed with median salary of INR 360000 and 22 students opted for higher studies. A total of 516 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Shriram College of Agricultural Engineeringand 546 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 546 students 427 were placed with median salary of INR 437500 and 18 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 17 students were admitted at Shriram College of Agricultural Engineering and 1 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 1 students 1 were placed with median salary of INR 650000. A total of 35 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Shriram College of Agricultural Engineeringand 1 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 1 students 1 were placed with median salary of INR 1210000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shriram College of Agricultural Engineering offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Science. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Sc. Shriram College of Agricultural Engineering fee structure ranges between INR 1,02,702 to 2,25,228.

Teachers do not have proper knowledge. Teachers take commission-based classes that are provided to students, and students cannot deny joining these paid classes.

placements.overview: School of Engineering and Technology, is located in Bahadurgarh, Haryana. Established in 2012, it is a partnership institute approved by AICTE. School of Engineering and Technology provides 13 UG and PG courses in 6 specialisations, namely Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA and PG Diploma are some of the courses offered at School of Engineering and Technology. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The total fee at School of Engineering and Technology is INR 2,82,000. School of Engineering and Technology has a student intake of 588 for all the courses. The average median package at School of Engineering and Technology is INR 4,22,727. School of Engineering and Technology offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Bansal Group of Institutes?

faqs.answer:
A:    Bansal Group of Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or Institute recognised by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. 
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. 
The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent.

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: JIS college is wasteful for students.

content.Placements: In my college, placement of students in our course is the highest percent, and companies visit college for placements. Students got internships from our college, and in my college, the highest companies visited.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, facilities are very clean, and classrooms are also very clean. The branches in my college are neat and clean. The library is very silent for students so they can concentrate on their courses. Sports in my college are very beneficial for students.
content.Faculty: In my college, teachers are very helpful for students because student doubts are cleared by teachers. They are qualified, and teaching quality is very high. The faculty in my college is very experienced, and my percentage in last semester is 80 percent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is value for money.

content.Placements: Placements in Bansal Institute of Research Technology & Science have a good placement rate. Around 80–90 percent of students get placed through campus placements and grab a good package. The highest package is 42 LPA, and the average package is 4–5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Every lecture hall has a smart board, which makes studying easier. Labs are very good. Each class has its own Wi-Fi. There is no hostel on the college campus, and the hostel charges are also decent.

individual_reviews.title: Not good at placement, but other facilities are awesome.

content.Placements: Placement in the Bansal campus is very poor because I am a recent passout of this campus. First, when I got admission to this campus, they told me there are so many opportunities available for their career, but in my final year, I didn't get placed in any company because most of the companies don't belong to my field, and many companies don't hire students.
content.Faculty: Exams are very strict in this campus, which is good for the students. And there is a separate department for the exam, which holds the exams and offers a very good environment for them. If we are talking about the exam copy checking, which is very fast, and they will give the results within 10 days. Courses are good, and their teachers are good at teaching, but they also motivate students to put in some extra effort. They are available anytime for the student and help as they are. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An above average college but nothing too remarkable.

content.Placements: A huge number of students get placed in their fourth year. The college says it's 80–90% placement rate, but in truth, not all placements are in technical fields, which is important for every fresher. The highest package goes up to 12 LPA, and the lowest goes very low just ₹15,000 per month until training is complete, depending on the company’s conditions. Internships are only allowed if they're paid; otherwise, the college shows no consideration or approval. Top roles offered are product engineer, team leader in product design, etc. Roles offered are good, but you need to be skilled in things like DSA.

Campus facilities are Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, a digital library, sports facilities, and seminar halls. No dedicated hostel. Students typically stay in nearby Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana buildings.
Use of signal jammers is reported in some areas. Mess & Canteen has basic facilities available, but quality may vary.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bansal Institute of Research and Technology, Bansal Group of InstitutesReviewed on 22 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good as compared to look wise. Our college is excellent compared to other colleges. Facilities are very good in our computer science branch. All labs are available. The library is fully furnished. 24-hour water facility is available. Our college does not provide a hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Bansal Institute of Research  Technology and ScienceReviewed on 16 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is very good and very sincere towards study facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-organized and systematic. All labs are also well-organized and contain all the required equipment. There is a library, and all necessary medical facilities are available for emergencies. Sports activities are also held at national and international levels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bansal Institute of Research and Technology, Bansal Group of InstitutesReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, very good college. It provides placement and very good knowledge to develop our skills.
reviews.review_text: All the time, water is available as per the climate. The infrastructure is well and good, each and every department is placed on different floors. Classrooms are good, approximately 70 students sit in one class, and every bench takes 2 students. The library is very good, fully furnished, and all books related to every course are available. Our college does not have a hostel, one is provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Bansal Institute of Research  Technology and ScienceReviewed on 13 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Bansal College makes our career bright.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very good in this college. They also provide Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are too good. Labs are so good, and all computers have very good configurations. The library is also good, with many books present. The quality of the mess is very good and hygienic, with so many food items available. The food is so good and healthy. Medical facilities are available 24/7. There are also many sports activities organized.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Bansal Institute of Science and TechnologyReviewed on 7 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. Students can get placed if they study hard. We can participate in activities.
reviews.review_text: Classroom are clear. It has almost all facilities. Sometimes, there will be no electricity, but we can handle it. The library is good and it has almost all books which I want. Labs are good with very high machines and they provide full knowledge to us.

faqs.answer: Balaji institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives good experience.

review_content.Placements: Around 20-30% of students got placed in our course. The recruiting companies were not good and the salary packages were different. The lowest salary offered was Rs.20,000 per month and the highest salary was Rs.35,000 to Rs.40,000 per month. Internship program was not conducted on time.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not provided in our college for all the students. Library and labs were available. Classrooms were not hygienic. Medical facilities were not available. Food served in the canteen was not hygienic. Our college conducted sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: The college is the best in Chhatarpur and Bundelkhand.

review_content.Placements: I completed my engineering in 2014. It was the first batch of our college, and there was not even a single company visited the campus for placements. However, I was appeared in the off-campus drives in Bhopal and got selected in HCL Technologies as a graduate trainee engineer. So I suggest you not to depend on the college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: I joined this college in 2010, and it was the 1st batch of the college. The college has a library, workshop and all the amenities that an engineering college should have. Our classrooms were good. The college was enabled with Wi-Fi connectivity in June 2013. The library was good. There was a canteen available earlier. Later we faced problems with canteen as no vendor was ready to open canteen again. There was no hostel facility provided by the college.

review_summary.college_name: Pandit Dev Prabhakar Shastri College of Technology (PDSCT) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives good experience.

content.Placements: Around 20-30% of students got placed in our course. The recruiting companies were not good and the salary packages were different. The lowest salary offered was Rs.20,000 per month and the highest salary was Rs.35,000 to Rs.40,000 per month. Internship program was not conducted on time.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not provided in our college for all the students. Library and labs were available. Classrooms were not hygienic. Medical facilities were not available. Food served in the canteen was not hygienic. Our college conducted sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best in Chhatarpur and Bundelkhand.

content.Placements: I completed my engineering in 2014. It was the first batch of our college, and there was not even a single company visited the campus for placements. However, I was appeared in the off-campus drives in Bhopal and got selected in HCL Technologies as a graduate trainee engineer. So I suggest you not to depend on the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: I joined this college in 2010, and it was the 1st batch of the college. The college has a library, workshop and all the amenities that an engineering college should have. Our classrooms were good. The college was enabled with Wi-Fi connectivity in June 2013. The library was good. There was a canteen available earlier. Later we faced problems with canteen as no vendor was ready to open canteen again. There was no hostel facility provided by the college.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal).

review_content.Placements: There were not many placements in our college. Only BPOs visited the college to recruit the students of our batch and our senior batch. The packages offered to the students range from 1 lakh per annum to 2 lakhs per annum. No internship is offered. By joining Aurora, you end up wasting 4 years of your life.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are the other worst category in our college. No Wi-Fi facility is provided. Labs are available with limited equipment. Sufficient classrooms are not available, they are managed by giving alternate half days. There is no ground to play. The food provided in the canteen is not much good. We all have suffered from these facilities for four years.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: 50-50 college depends on your self study.

review_content.Placements: Yes we have got placements but not from core companies. We all got about got 15-20 companies for placement in 2016. But in that count they are 5 companies only for CSE and it. And other 15 were BPO's and technical support associate. Overall college strives to get placements for their students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as Wi-Fi and internet are adequate in our college. Classrooms and lab facilities are clean and maintained nicely. Canteen is the best part in our college,consists of all types of food and neatly maintained. We don't have college hostel but we do have other private hostels near by college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: As per present fee, it's not worth for placements and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: At the end of our batch, we got very fewer placements compared with our senior batches. We got companies like Amazon, Genpact, ICICI, Ux reactor, Purple talk, Ea sports and every company recruited minimum 10-20. We didn't get any core companies, and all are mostly BPO's.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is below average. We didn't have required systems in computer labs and required instruments in core labs. The classrooms are good and comfortable. We have sports room also, in sports room we will be having chess, carrom and table tennis.

faqs.answer: Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B. Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University. The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class from any recognised Board/Council.

overview_faqs.question: Is Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Aurora's Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) has a review rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.4 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty. There are no good placements.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students in our college were placed. The highest salary package offered was 2 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was up to 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies offered placements. Top roles were not offered in our course. The salary package offered in our course is up to 2.5 LPA. Internships offered in our course are very less.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is too good, and labs in our course are not good. It does not work sometimes. The facility of labs is separate from the classroom. Classrooms are there in our course and department. Facilities in our course are good. The hostel facility is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal).

content.Placements: Companies like Amazon, Oyo, Infosys and Google visited our campus for placements. I was studying at this college. The college has celebrated the fest and an annual day extremely well. The education provided was good. Ragging is not encouraged. The HOD and staff members of the civil department are very good. They made me study a lot. They played cricket, and they are the champions of our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like labs, classrooms etc. Sports and games facilities like hockey, chess, cricket, football, volleyball, throwball, table tennis, table tennis, carrom, gym, etc., are available. It is a very good college to study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aurora’s Technological and Management Academy (ATMA Uppal).

content.Placements: There were not many placements in our college. Only BPOs visited the college to recruit the students of our batch and our senior batch. The packages offered to the students range from 1 lakh per annum to 2 lakhs per annum. No internship is offered. By joining Aurora, you end up wasting 4 years of your life.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are the other worst category in our college. No Wi-Fi facility is provided. Labs are available with limited equipment. Sufficient classrooms are not available, they are managed by giving alternate half days. There is no ground to play. The food provided in the canteen is not much good. We all have suffered from these facilities for four years.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: 50-50 college depends on your self study.

content.Placements: Yes we have got placements but not from core companies. We all got about got 15-20 companies for placement in 2016. But in that count they are 5 companies only for CSE and it. And other 15 were BPO's and technical support associate. Overall college strives to get placements for their students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as Wi-Fi and internet are adequate in our college. Classrooms and lab facilities are clean and maintained nicely. Canteen is the best part in our college,consists of all types of food and neatly maintained. We don't have college hostel but we do have other private hostels near by college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: As per present fee, it's not worth for placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: At the end of our batch, we got very fewer placements compared with our senior batches. We got companies like Amazon, Genpact, ICICI, Ux reactor, Purple talk, Ea sports and every company recruited minimum 10-20. We didn't get any core companies, and all are mostly BPO's.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is below average. We didn't have required systems in computer labs and required instruments in core labs. The classrooms are good and comfortable. We have sports room also, in sports room we will be having chess, carrom and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides learning beyond the classroom.

I would rate 3.5 out of 5 for infrastructure. All textbooks are available in the library. Medical facilities are also available here.

description: Meerut International Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Meerut International Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Meerut International Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Meerut International Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing rank was 1124052 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engin

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 1124052 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 1038654 in 2023.

Meerut International Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Meerut International Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Meerut International Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Meerut International Institute of Technology.

As the Meerut International Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Meerut International Institute of Technology.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with the closing ranks of 2019522, 2112634 and 2116111, respectively.

For admission to Meerut International Institute of Technology for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. overview_faqs.question: How is BTech Biotechnology as a career?
overview_faqs.answer: A career in Biotechnology can be promising and rewarding, and pursuing a Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Biotechnology can open up various opportunities in both the industrial and research sectors. Here are some common job profiles that individuals with a B.Tech in Biotechnology might pursue along with their estimates salary packages:Job ProfilesAverage Placement PackageBiotechnologist/Research ScientistINR 8 LPABioprocess EngineerINR 4.5 LPAClinical Research AssociateINR 4.1 LPABioinformatics AnalystINR 5.3 LPAQuality Control/Quality Assurance AnalystINR 4.5 LPAPharmaceutical/Biotech Sales and MarketingINR 6 LPANOTE: The above mentioned salaries have been taken from Ambitionbox; therefore it may vary in future.

review_content.Placements: Placements were hard to find in our college. There were no companies that visit our campus to hire students. There were 120 students in the civil department. Ultra Tech Cement visited our college for recruitment and around 5 students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. Our campus was huge. Laboratory was decent, but smart classrooms were not available. Departments were differentiated into civil, mechanical, electrical, electronic, and communication. Hostel facilities were good. The mess fee structure was Rs.36,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Totally dissatisfied there.

review_content.Placements: No placement drive is provide for the students. When I studied there, so no company was exposed to students. No company was there, so no top companies were approaching. No student got an internship from my course. And nothing was provide to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, Labs are poorly constructed, library lacks books. Hostel rooms are good. But about the mess, it's already a mess. And No canteen there in the whole college. No medical facilities and you need to visit the hospital by yourself. Sports week is here, but it's blissful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Rajasthan Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Our college provided an average salary package but by the time of campus placements, it was lower. Almost 20% of students were placed. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. Laursen and Turbo and two of India's leading oil companies visited our campus for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, all facilities were available to students like a library, a playground, labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, a hostel, and a canteen. Good quality food was available in the canteen. There was a separate apartment is for the hostel. In our college, a medical facility was available. A playground was also available for playing games.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college in Jaipur.

review_content.Placements: 99% of students are placed in this course every year. The highest package is 60 LPA, and the average package is 20 LPA. 60% of students got internships from my course. After this course, we can either become a teacher or we can give any type of government exam.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a well-furnished and clean library present in the college. There are all types of labs which are related to the course. The hostel rooms are well-cleaned and in good condition. The food we get is above average. There is also a canteen present for college students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: There is very good infrastructure at our college.

review_content.Placements: There are 60% of students who are placed from our college. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the minimum package is 5 LPA. Almost all the students got an internship from our college, and there is an internal internship programme too in our college. The roles which are offered are development-related.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities in the college, such as computer labs with the internet. Proper sitting classes are also held at their perfect time, and all the syllabus is completed on time. The hostel facilities are too good, and the canteen size is big and has so much space.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Balaji Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A short headline that summarizes this college absolutely because of the faculty and good placement.

content.Placements: In our batch, 70 to 75 percent of students are placed successfully. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA while the lowest is about 3 LPA. The average package stood close to 5 to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, and some core companies, depending on the branch. Around 60% of students also got internship opportunities in reputed firms, which helped in building practical exposure. The top roles offered were software engineer, data analyst, business associate, and some core technical roles. Overall, placement support was good, and the training sessions conducted by the placement cell really helped us prepare.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good faculty, decent placements, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: Around 75% of D. Pharmacy students are placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest is 2 LPA, and the average is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters are Apollo, Cipla, and Sun Pharma. 70% of students got internships in hospitals and pharma firms. The roles offered are pharmacist, QA, and MR.
content.Infrastructure: The D. Pharmacy department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs, and a library. The hostel offers clean rooms, 24/7 medical aid, sports facilities, and a gym. The mess food is hygienic with veg/non-veg options, and the canteen serves snacks and meals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Jaipur.

content.Placements: 99% of students are placed in this course every year. The highest package is 60 LPA, and the average package is 20 LPA. 60% of students got internships from my course. After this course, we can either become a teacher or we can give any type of government exam.
content.Infrastructure: There is a well-furnished and clean library present in the college. There are all types of labs which are related to the course. The hostel rooms are well-cleaned and in good condition. The food we get is above average. There is also a canteen present for college students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: There is very good infrastructure at our college.

content.Placements: There are 60% of students who are placed from our college. The highest package is 20 LPA, and the minimum package is 5 LPA. Almost all the students got an internship from our college, and there is an internal internship programme too in our college. The roles which are offered are development-related.
content.Infrastructure: There are so many facilities in the college, such as computer labs with the internet. Proper sitting classes are also held at their perfect time, and all the syllabus is completed on time. The hostel facilities are too good, and the canteen size is big and has so much space.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A college with good infrastructure but placements are not good.

content.Placements: I'm pursuing a bachelor's degree in the artificial intelligence branch. This batch was started in 2021 and I will pass out this course in 2025. Unfortunately, the course failed to meet my expectations in multiple aspects. The placement scenario is far from ideal. I'm in my 7th semester, and not even a single student in our branch is placed. Not only in the AI branch, CS branch students are also not placed in any company. While the college advertises big names, most of them are local startups. Internships are a similar story. The software developer intern is the most offered role for our college students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Balaji Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: SBGI offers well-furnished air cooled hostel rooms and these rooms are also equipped with facilities like 24 hrs medical assistance, indoor and outdoor games, well-furnished mess, Wi-Fi, common room, and reading room.

library.description:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Balaji College of PharmacyReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A short headline that summarizes this college absolutely because of the faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, with well maintained classrooms, spacious labs, high speed Wi-Fi, and a library that has enough resources for students. The hostel facilities are also decent, with clean rooms and proper water and electricity supply. The mess food is average but hygienic, and the canteen provides a variety of snacks at reasonable prices. Medical facilities are available on campus, and sports grounds are well maintained, giving students a chance to take part in out...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Balaji College of PharmacyReviewed on 21 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty, decent placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The D. Pharmacy department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs, and a library. The hostel offers clean rooms, 24/7 medical aid, sports facilities, and a gym. The mess food is hygienic with veg/non-veg options, and the canteen serves snacks and meals.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-furnished and clean library present in the college. There are all types of labs which are related to the course. The hostel rooms are well-cleaned and in good condition. The food we get is above average. There is also a canteen present for college students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: There is very good infrastructure at our college.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities in the college, such as computer labs with the internet. Proper sitting classes are also held at their perfect time, and all the syllabus is completed on time. The hostel facilities are too good, and the canteen size is big and has so much space.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructure but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good. There is a large building. It has lights, fans, and a ventilation system with a fire extinguisher and fire alarms. Air-conditioned computer labs are available. There is Wi-Fi, but it's only for faculty. Students are not allowed to use Wi-Fi. The library contains a large collection of books, but sometimes there is a shortage of seating arrangements in the library. As I'm a day scholar, I don't know much about hostel facilities but as my friends told me, the foo...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 2 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College doesn't matter. Student skills matter. College is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. All sports facilities are available in this college and all types of labs are available, like in B.Tech CSE, OOPS lab, DSA labs, such types of labs are available in the college. Hostel food is very good compared to other colleges.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sri Balaji PG MahavidyalayaReviewed on 22 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and bad faculty.
reviews.review_text: Yes, it has a good library but no Wi-Fi and most of the books are only in Hindi for the English medium; very few content is available as compared to the Hindi medium. The average classroom condition is good. The labs are in good condition. And yes, the hostel and mess facilities are available; the average food taste is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sri Balaji PG MahavidyalayaReviewed on 27 May 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Sri Balaji PG Mahavidyalaya Jaipur facility and infrastructure review.
reviews.review_text: In the college, you get Wi-Fi with a password that you obtain through a long process of documentation, and you get only 300MB monthly. The library has old books, and they don't take students' demands for books seriously. The food they provide is average Indian hostel style; they don't let us play until events.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 23 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering .
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities and infrastructure available in my college, like Wi-Fi, practical labs, a library, classrooms, and a playground. The quality of my hostel is very good. The mess is very good. The food at the hostel is awesome. There are three canteens, a sports ground, and medical facilities available at any time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 3 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for taking admission at a reasonable fee structure.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in this college. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratoeries are better. There is a decent library in this college. A playground is available. Hostel facilities are good. The food quality is decent. Medical facilities are available for emergencies. Sports are conducted such as football, cricket, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 12 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college and I am so happy to get admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, playgrounds, and sports clubs are available. The hostel is good. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 10 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: All the things are fit and fine according to placement, quality, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: In my course, many facilities are available for the students and teachers, like labs, libraries, wi-fi, playgrounds, sports activities, and others. Our teachers are very good and sincere. They are also available to help the students. The quality of the food is very good. There are many different types of food, according to the schedule. The medical facilities are also available for emergencies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 29 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Sri Balaji college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available in my college and my course like wi-fi, library, labs, sports activities and classroom etc. Hostel facilities are good but the quality of food sometimes is not good but all the things are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 22 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities. The hostel has many rooms. Our college has a library. It has Wi-Fi. Our college has many labs like a chemistry lab, a physics lab, and an electrical lab. The quality of the food is very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Sri Balaji College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 16 Feb 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided all the necessary infrastructure and facilities. The campus was very big and Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms and labs were clean and hygienic. Transportation facility was provided to all the local students. Hostel facility was very good. Mess was hygienic and clean and served tasty food.  Practical labs like the machine lab, circuit lab, and power system lab were well-equipped and well-maintained.
